Mechanical Keyboard (Quiet)

Local fixture product page.

Reviews

Ethan ★★★★★

Solid build quality and very quiet. Great for shared spaces.

Sophia ★★★★☆

Keys feel nice. Took a day to get used to the layout.

James ★★★★★

Excellent typing experience and the backlight is subtle, not distracting.

Olivia ★★★★☆

Good value overall. Wish it included a wrist rest in the box.
